items.title: Ex-CNN host Don Lemon pleads not guilty in Minnesota church protest case
items.description: The former CNN host and eight others have been charged for interrupting a church service to protest immigration raids in the state.

items.title: Six possible effects of Trump's climate policy change
items.description: The announcement on Thursday removes the legal bedrock for much of US environmental legislation.

items.title: World's rules-based order 'no longer exists', Germany's Merz warns
items.description: "Our freedom is not guaranteed" in an era of big powers, the German chancellor tells Munich's security summit.

items.title: Head of Dubai-based ports giant quits after Epstein links revealed
items.description: Sultan Ahmed bin Sulayem’s exit comes after files showed he appears to have exchanged hundreds of emails with Epstein.

items.title: The war dead pictured on banned Ukrainian athlete's helmet
items.description: Vladyslav Heraskevych's helmet depicts fellow athletes who have been killed since Russia's full-scale invasion of his country.
